title: ARI dashboard TreeNode
description: One node of the BFTS/pipeline tree as emitted verbatim inside GET /state (data.nodes) and GET /api/checkpoint/<id>/summary (nodes_tree.nodes). Mirrors frontend/src/types/index.ts TreeNode (lines 3-22). The backend passes raw tree.json/nodes_tree.json node dicts through untransformed, so only 'id' is guaranteed; the frontend fills defaults for the remaining fields. All other keys are therefore optional here (additive-subset policy).
